description.en: Play the Mystic Knight if you wish to make close-combat Spellstrikes with runic weapons in hand.
As a downtime move, you can upgrade a tier 1 primary weapon and a tier 1 secondary weapon into tier 2 improved weapons of their kind. The upgrade lasts until you take this downtime move again.

When you use a spell or grimoire card to make a **Spellstrike**, that card can be in your loadout or vault.

In addition, your runewright weapons are now upgraded into tier 3 advanced weapons of their kind.

When you use a spell or grimoire card in your vault to make a **Spellstrike**, you can immediately swap it into your loadout without paying its Recall Cost.

In addition, your runewright weapons are now upgraded into tier 4 legendary weapons of their kind.
Play the Eldritch Sniper if you wish to make **Spellstrikes** from afar as a solo or alongside a spotter.
If the range of your primary weapon is greater than very close, you can increase the range of the action rolls involved in your **Spellstrike** to that of the weapon.

You can initiate a Tag Team Roll, but only to make a **Spellstrike**.

When you and an ally make a **Spellstrike** as a Tag Team Roll, that ally rolls one of your Duality dice and makes one of the two action rolls involved in your **Spellstrike**, using their own weapon or card as needed.
When you and an ally make a **Spellstrike** as a Tag Team Roll, each gains 1 additional Hope on a roll with Hope, and the DM gains no Fear token on a roll with Fear.
